title: Horror by herobrine (Horror)
description: this modpack adds herobrine to your minecraft world by using from the fog and more. make sure to not upset herobrine :)
body:
this adds the myth HEROBRINE to your world. this adds many mods to this modpack like, from the fog, man from the fog, shaders

Herobrine is a Steve like figure with white eyes that likes to stalk the player and haunt their world.
Discord-
https://discord.gg/ARPAxEf8


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
spawns on day 3 and his spawn is uncommon, if you want to change then open the config,
